infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PunchClock needs your location to verify your punches against your job site.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PunchClock uses background location to remind you when you arrive at a job site.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: PunchClock uses Face ID to secure your kiosk session.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow PunchClock to use your location.
